{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"The optimizer and budget-aware schedule helped, but the wider 4-layer MLP still looks over-parameterized for this fixed-step run. {"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"topk","secondary_modes":["indexing","caching"],"rationale":"The current setup is close to the baseline, so this is a fine-tuning move on the existing AdamW+cosine run: a slightly smaller base step and lighter decay should reduce overshoot and preserve the fit gained by the simpler 3x256 MLP.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 7e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.999)","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"layout","secondary_modes":["micro"],"rationale":"The remaining mismatch is likely the normalization layer: BatchNorm on a flattened-image MLP with a modest batch size is often noisier than LayerNorm. Swapping that one line keeps the current budget-aware optimizer setup intact while making the hidden activations more stable.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"                layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim))","new":"                layers.append(nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim))","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["layout"],"rationale":"LayerNorm clearly regressed relative to the earlier BatchNorm setup. Reverting to BatchNorm and raising the batch size should restore the stronger normalization behavior while giving the optimizer more stable gradients per step.","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"                layers.append(nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim))","new":"                layers.append(nn.BatchNorm1d(hidden_dim))","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"BATCH_SIZE = 64","new":"BATCH_SIZE = 128","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}]}

{"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":[],"rationale":"The current run is still data-limited under the fixed 256-step budget: batch 128 only covers about two-thirds of an epoch. {"declared_mode":"micro","edit_format":"structured_edits","primary_mode":"micro","secondary_modes":["topk"],"rationale":"The fixed-step run is still data-limited, so the most direct remaining lever is to spend each step on more examples.
